title: codereview-pass1: select_mitigation_params still uses OR; make fully declarative with IF-THEN-ELSE
description: Pseudocode must avoid all language-specific operators including OR. Use explicit IF defined(metrics.load_factor) THEN load := metrics.load_factor ELSE load := 0. Update all 3 pseudocode blocks. Cross-ref to project-LICHEN-e70b. Use standard IETF pseudocode notation per draft-lichen-tdma style.
close_reason: Rewrote select_mitigation_params and all pseudocode blocks in spec/02a-coordinated-capacity.md to use pure IF-THEN-ELSE declarative form without any OR operators; followed IETF pseudocode and draft-lichen-tdma style; 3 codereview passes
